title: Tester v0.4.11 Full Calculator List + Data Update Help Fix
notes:
Changes:
- Adds the 4th calculator to the Calculators tab:
  Drop / NPC Kills Calculator
- The calculator estimates:
  average kills, average time, 50% chance estimate, and 90% chance estimate.
- Fixes Help > Check Tester Data Update by pointing it to:
  tester/latest-data-update.json
  instead of the old tester/latest-update.json.
- Updates Tester current app version to 0.4.11 for app update checks.
- Keeps the approved-data auto-load behavior from v0.4.10.

Publish as full Tester app update:
